reference_repo_influences: paper2code: ambiguity audit separates specified vehicle function calling from unspecified MAformac runtime parity.
DeepPaperNote: report keeps paper proof and MAformac absorption separate.
MinerU-Document-Explorer: later PDF/OCR pass should preserve sections/tables before proposal citation.
paper-qa: contested claims should be rerun as citation-grounded QA before load-bearing OpenSpec text.
MinerU: paper-only group is explicitly OCR-ready if PDF extraction is needed.
docling-mcp: lightweight document conversion fallback remains valid for future structured extraction.
algorithm_traits: Paper-only until official implementation repo is found

maformac_insertion_points.recommendation: Use as domain pressure for explicit vehicle D-domain training surface; no training authorization.
Compare vehicle-function surface to concrete D-domain rendered tools; do not import gRPC assumptions.
Future C6 cases should distinguish vehicle action success from generic assistant text.
Keep MAformac guard/readback proof local; paper does not authorize runtime bypass.

openspec_candidates: Future OpenSpec note: in-vehicle SLM function-calling absorption checklist for C5/C6.
Future design note: compression/pruning is out of current Qwen3+LoRA mainline unless separately proposed.

gate.rationale: Strongest domain-fit paper, but paper-only and model/runtime mismatch prevent immediate adoption.
stop_conditions: No runtime latency or product proof claim.
Rerun official-repo branch if a repo is later found.

residual_risks: Full PDF section/page locator not yet extracted.
Phi-3 compression assumptions may not transfer to Qwen3/MLX.
